description.en: Selected experience, capabilities, and working contexts.

title.en: Selected experience, capabilities, and working contexts.

body.en: This page is structured as a concise, editable summary for future replacement with a formal CV or downloadable file. It keeps the portfolio navigation coherent while remaining easy to update by hand.
Designed and built editorial-style portfolio sites, archival interfaces, and visual presentation systems using lightweight front-end tools.
Developed image systems, concept studies, and illustrations for research-driven, cultural, and narrative projects.
Semantic HTML, CSS systems, Tailwind CDN workflows, vanilla JavaScript.
Editorial layout, archive structures, typography hierarchy, image-led interface design.
Visual development, illustration, sequential image studies, concept framing.
Figma, Photoshop, Illustrator, lightweight static site authoring.
This placeholder resume page can later be replaced with a PDF link, detailed CV, or a more formal experience listing.
